_publications._publicationTitle: Restoring functional neurofibromin by protein transduction.

_contextSnippet: Using the endocytosis interfering transduction reagent Endo-Porter (Gene Tools, LLC) led to stronger fluorescence signals within the fibroblasts after transduction of synNF1-eGFP both in fixed and living cells
details: Led to stronger fluorescence signals within fibroblasts after transduction of synNF1-eGFP compared to other transduction reagents in both fixed and living cells
